title: Forgotten building reborn as mural masterpiece
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - What started as a bold...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - What started as a bold vision shared by two Willowmore residents has now blossomed into something truly inspiring.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - What started as a bold vision shared by two Willowmore residents has now blossomed into something truly inspiring."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Revive Willowmore, the local non-profit organisation that was established by El-Anne Smith and Veronica du Plessis in 2023 to drive local transformation, still continues to breathe new life into this small Karoo town - one project at a time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After successfully leading Willowmore to become an Eastern Cape finalist in the 2023 Kwêla Dorp van die Jaar competition and securing R20 000 from Lottoland to upgrade the town’s recycling facility and youth training centre, Revive Willowmore has stayed true to its mission of “creating a legacy of change for future generations”.","html":"After successfully leading Willowmore to become an Eastern Cape finalist in the 2023 Kwêla Dorp van die Jaar competition and securing R20 000 from Lottoland to upgrade the town’s recycling facility and youth training centre, Revive Willowmore has stayed true to its mission of “creating a legacy of change for future generations”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This month - June - they tackled one of the town’s most visibly neglected buildings right in the centre of town -a long-forgotten structure that had become an eyesore for residents and visitors alike.","html":"This month - June - they tackled one of the town’s most visibly neglected buildings right in the centre of town -a long-forgotten structure that had become an eyesore for residents and visitors alike."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But instead of simply patching it up, the team took a creative leap by transforming its side into a work of art.","html":"But instead of simply patching it up, the team took a creative leap by transforming its side into a work of art."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The result is a mural that is already turning heads and sparking conversation.","html":"The result is a mural that is already turning heads and sparking conversation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Revive Willowmore chairperson, Veronica du Plessis, the idea was inspired by a recent visit to Friemersheim.","html":"According to Revive Willowmore chairperson, Veronica du Plessis, the idea was inspired by a recent visit to Friemersheim."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“When we saw the incredible murals on the buildings there, we knew we had to do something similar in Willowmore. We approached artist Fourie Ackermann, whose work in Friemersheim left a deep impression, and the rest is history.”","html":"“When we saw the incredible murals on the buildings there, we knew we had to do something similar in Willowmore. We approached artist Fourie Ackermann, whose work in Friemersheim left a deep impression, and the rest is history.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ackermann began painting on 17 June, starting with a striking kudu - the animal chosen by the community.","html":"Ackermann began painting on 17 June, starting with a striking kudu - the animal chosen by the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over two weeks, the wall has gradually been transformed into a breathtaking Karoo landscape, capturing the essence of the region with stunning detail and warmth.","html":"Over two weeks, the wall has gradually been transformed into a breathtaking Karoo landscape, capturing the essence of the region with stunning detail and warmth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Locals and visitors alike are encouraged to stop by and see the mural for themselves - a proud symbol of Willowmore’s revival and the power of community-driven change.","html":"Locals and visitors alike are encouraged to stop by and see the mural for themselves - a proud symbol of Willowmore’s revival and the power of community-driven change."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Forgotten building reborn as mural masterpiece
